name: Clash
effect: 1 character gains +1 ATK if its ATK is 1 or less. Then draw 1 card.

name: Cloud Rose
effect: Draw 1 card and bottom deck 1 card from your hand. Then deal 1 damage to a character.

name: Reinforcements
effect: 1 character gets +1 ATK until end of turn. Look at top 5 cards; add 1 (not Reinforcements) then rearrange.

name: Super-Charge
effect: You can re-charge your character or Field Card again during the turn.

name: Circuit Battery
effect: Recharge or reset all cards on your Field.

name: Malfunction
effect: Drop 1 from the top of your deck, then deal 2 damage to a character on the field or Storage Zone.

name: Telekinesis
effect: Deal 2 damage to all characters on the Field.

name: Assassin's Mark
effect: Target 1 character. That character cannot attack this turn.

name: Cold Fusion
effect: Negate the activation of 1 card effect.

name: Barrier
effect: Prevent 1 attack from being resolved. Then reduce the ATK of 1 of your characters by 1.

name: Medic Aid
effect: Restore 1 health to a character.

name: Weather Change
effect: Change the active field element until end of turn.

name: Resurrection
effect: Return 1 character from your Trash to your hand.

name: United
effect: All your characters gain +1 Attack until end of turn.

name: Rage
effect: If a player has more than 5 cards in hand, that player discards 1 card.

name: Storage Space
effect: Store up to 2 cards from your hand in the Storage Zone.

name: The Cove
effect: Spend 1 Element:Look at the top 3 cards of your deck or your opponents deck. Rearrange those cards in any order and place them back on top.

name: The Ruins
effect: Spend 2 Elements: Deal 1 damage to a character.

name: The Throne Room
effect: Spend 2 Elements: Return 1 Trigger character card from the Trash to your hand.

name: The Cementary
effect: Trash the top two cards from your deck, then reduce a character's value by -1 until end of turn.

name: Sky Light City
effect: Spend 2 Elements: All your characters gain +1 ATK until end of turn.

name: The City of Rapture
effect: Spend 2 Elements: Draw 2 cards, then place 1 card from hand on the bottom of your deck.

name: The Fire Temple
effect: Spend 2 Elements: 1 character gains +2 ATK until end of turn.

name: Wrath
effect: [Psychic SR] When deployed, gains +2 ATK for each Psychic character in your Storage Zone.

name: Greed
effect: [Psychic SR] Draw 2 cards. Then, your opponent discards 1 card from their hand.

name: Gluttony
effect: [Psychic SR] Look at your opponent's hand. Choose up to 2 cards to discard.

name: Spite
effect: [When Deployed] Look at top 5 cards of your deck. Place 1 Psychic character with cost 3 or less into your hand.

name: Fury
effect: [When Deployed] Deal 1 damage to a character on the Field.

name: Taboo
effect: [Defender] Trash this card from your hand: Block 1 attack damage.

name: Pride
effect: [When Deployed] All your Psychic characters gain +1 ATK until end of turn.

name: Malevolent
effect: [Only Once] Negate 1 character effect activation.

name: Savage
effect: [When Deployed] This character can attack the turn it is deployed.

name: Victorious
effect: [When Deployed] Draw 1 card for each character your opponent controls.

name: Rage (Psychic)
effect: [Psychic Character] When deployed, destroy 1 card in the Storage Zone.

name: Malice
effect: [When Deployed] Deal 1 damage to all characters on the Field.

name: Desire
effect: [Once Per Turn / During Your Turn] If you Withdraw 1 Element for your next turn due to an effect, place 1 character with 1 Health from your opponent's Storage Zone on top of their deck.

name: Malign
effect: [Defender] Trash from hand: Block 1 attack damage. [Once Per Turn] Trash 1 character (value 3 or less) from top of deck. Then place 1 character with 1 HP from opponent's Field or Storage on top of their deck.

name: Lust
effect: [When Deployed] Draw 2 cards. Then trash 1 card from your hand. You may place 1 character (value 3 or less) from your Trash on top of your deck.

name: Envy
effect: [When Deployed] Trash 1 character (value 3 or less) from your Storage Zone: Gain 1 Element.

name: Vicious
effect: [When Deployed] Trash 1 character (value 3 or less) from the top of your deck: Gain 1 Element.

name: Cain
effect: Discharge your Field Card. Remove all characters with 1 or less ATK from a player's Storage Zone. Then draw 2 cards.

name: Noah
effect: [Mercenary SR] Return up to 2 Mercenary characters from your Trash to your hand.

name: Mary
effect: [When Deployed] Add 1 Mercenary character with cost 2 or less from your deck to your hand.

name: Abel
effect: [When Deployed] Move 1 Mercenary character with cost 2 or less from your deck or Storage Zone to your hand.

name: Aaron
effect: [When Deployed] Look at the top 3 cards of your deck. Add 1 Mercenary to your hand.

name: Azrael
effect: [Mercenary SR] Destroy 1 character on the Field.

name: Gabriel
effect: [When Deployed] Store 1 Mercenary character from your hand in the Storage Zone.

name: Ariel
effect: Look at the top 4 cards of your deck. Store 1 Mercenary character, excluding Ariel. Place remaining cards on bottom.

name: Raziel
effect: [Defender] Trash from hand: Block 1 attack damage. Then increase a character's ATK by 1.

name: Engel
effect: [When Deployed] Draw 1 card.

name: Raphael
effect: [When Deployed] Return 1 Mercenary from your Trash to your Storage Zone.

name: Joseph
effect: [Defender] Discard 1 card at random from your opponent's hand. Then draw 1 card. [Trash from hand: Block 1 attack damage]

name: Leah
effect: [When Deployed] All characters on your opponent's Field get -1 Attack.

name: Elijah
effect: [Any Time] If this card is in your hand, you may store it in the Storage Zone at any time.

name: Hannah
effect: [Only Once / Any Time] Trash 1 card from your Storage Zone. Then draw 2 cards.

name: Saturn
effect: [When Deployed] Give 1 character +1 ATK this turn.

name: Titan
effect: [When Deployed] All your characters gain +1 ATK until end of turn.

name: Jupiter
effect: [When Deployed] Choose a Lightning character (other than Jupiter) with a value 2 or less. It gains +1 ATK for one battle!

name: Luna
effect: [When Deployed] Return 1 character with a value of 3 or less to its owner's hand. Then, randomly Trash 1 card from that player's hand.

name: Mars
effect: [When Deployed] Return all characters on the Field to their owners' hands, except this card.

name: Mercury
effect: [During Your Turn] When you attack, draw 2 cards from the top of your deck. Then, discard 1 card from your hand to the Trash. [This card can attack the same turn it is played!]

name: Neptune
effect: [When Deployed] Store 1 card from your hand. Then, you may return 1 character with a value of 2 or less from the Field to its owner's hand.

name: Pegasi
effect: [When Deployed] Look at the top 4 cards of your deck. Add 1 to your hand, place the rest at the bottom in any order. You may then play 1 card from your hand (except Pegasi).

name: Polaris
effect: [When Deployed] Give 1 character on your Field the ability to attack this turn, even if it was just played (excluding this card).

name: Sirius
effect: [Any Time] If this card is in your hand, you may Trash it to block 1 attack damage.

name: Venus
effect: [During Your Turn] When this character attacks, your opponent cannot block that attack using Defenders.

name: Kepler
effect: [When Deployed][Defender] Draw 1 card from the top of your deck. Until the start of your next turn, your characters (not this card) cannot be removed from the Field. [Trash from hand: Block 1 attack damage]

name: Dagon
effect: [During Your Turn][On Attack] When this card attacks and removes a character from battle, play 1 character with a value of 3 or less from your Trash. [This card can attack the same turn it is played!]

name: Europa
effect: [When Deployed][Defender] Prevent 1 character from being removed from the Field until the start of your next turn. [Trash from hand: Block 1 attack damage]

name: Triton
effect: [During Your Turn][Once Per Turn] When you attack life, recharge 1 character on your Field with a value of 3 or less (excluding Triton).

name: Gadeirus
effect: Discharge all characters with value 4 or less until start of your next turn. Then Trash 1 discharged character with value 4 or less.

name: Smoker
effect: Once Per Turn: Trash 1 card from hand. Look at top 5 cards of deck; add 1 Atlantean character to hand. Rearrange rest.

name: Atlas
effect: [When Deployed] Trash 1 discharged character with value 2 or less from Field or Storage Zone.

name: Ampheres
effect: [Only Once] Discharge 1 character with value 2 or less. Then Trash 1 discharged character with value 3 or less.

name: Diaprepes
effect: [Only Once] Discharge your Field Card: Play 1 Event card with value 3 or less from your hand.

name: Azaes
effect: [Only Once] Discharge 1 Character until start of your next turn.

name: Mestor
effect: [Defender / When Deployed] Reduce value of all opponent's characters by 1. Then draw 1 card.

name: Makaira
effect: [When Deployed] Draw 2 cards from top of deck. Then Trash 1 card from your hand.

name: Topo
effect: [Defender] When you block: Discharge 1 character with value 3 or less until end of turn.

name: Cerdian
effect: [When Deployed] Add 1 Event from your Storage Zone to your hand.

name: Ondine
effect: [Any Time] If this card is in your hand, you may store it in the Storage Zone at any time.

name: Cetea
effect: [Any Time] Trash this card to Trash a discharged character in the Storage Zone.

name: Lady Ariel
effect: [SR / When Deployed] Discharge all characters in a player's Storage Zone until the start of your next turn. Then play 1 Event card (value 4 or less) from your hand.

name: Stamar
effect: [Defender] When you block, reduce the value of 1 character by 2. Then draw 1 card. [Trash from hand: Block 1 attack damage]

name: Tula
effect: [Only Once / Any Time] Discharge your Field Card: Discharge 1 card in a player's Storage Zone until the start of your next turn.

name: Carth
effect: [Defender SR / Only Once] Discharge a Field Card you control: Negate the activation of a card and Trash it.

name: Heracles
effect: [Only Once] Play 1 Trigger card or Trigger character from Trash. Then give 1 other character +1 Health.

name: Aion
effect: [Only Once] Trash a Trigger Card in your Storage Zone: Negate the activation of a character's effect.

name: Hermes
effect: [When Deployed] Look at your deck. Add 1 Holy Knight character with value 3 or less to your hand (not Hermes). Shuffle deck.

name: Ares
effect: Bottom deck 1 card from hand. Look at top 5 cards; add 1 Trigger card to hand. Place rest on bottom.

name: Apollo
effect: [SR / When Deployed] Discard 1 Trigger card from your hand. Then trash up to 2 characters with a value of 3 or less from the Field.

name: Hestia
effect: [Trigger Card / When Deployed] Draw 1 card. Then trash 1 character with a value of 3 or less from the Field.

name: Artemis
effect: [Defender / When Deployed] Add a Trigger Character card from the Trash to your Storage Zone. [Trash from hand: Block 1 attack damage]

name: Hana
effect: [Defender / Only Once] Trash 1 Trigger card from Storage Zone: Negate a character's 'when deployed' ability. [Trash from hand: Block 1 attack damage]

name: Hera
effect: [Only Once / Trigger Card / Any Time] Draw 2 cards. Then trash 1 card from your hand.

name: Demeter
effect: [Trigger Card / Any Time] You may trash this card: Trash 1 character with a value of 2 or less from the Field or Storage Zone.

name: Titus
effect: [Trigger Card / On Attack] When you attack life, Defenders cannot block!

name: Atlas (Knight)
effect: [Only Once / Trigger Card / Any Time] Discard 1 card from your hand. Add 1 Trigger card from your Storage Zone to your hand.

name: Orion
effect: [Trigger Card / Any Time] If this card is in your hand, you may store it in the Storage Zone at any time.

name: Herro
effect: [Any Time] Trash 1 Trigger card from your Storage Zone: Play 1 character with a value of 2 or less from your hand.

name: Napu
effect: Once Per Turn: When you attack a character, store top card of deck. Then may return a character from Storage Zone to hand.

name: Komodo
effect: [Any Time] Bottom deck 1 character with value 2 or less from field. Then trash this card.

name: Crow
effect: [When Deployed] Draw 2 cards. Place 1 card from hand on bottom of deck. Reduce value of all opponent's Field characters by 2.

name: Leo
effect: [When Deployed] Play up to 2 characters with value 2 or less from Trash. Your characters can attack this turn (except Leo).

name: Crocodile
effect: [SR / When Deployed] Draw 2 cards. Then gain 3 Elements of any type.

name: Flamingo
effect: [When Deployed] Return 1 Inferno character (other than this) from your Field or Storage to your hand. Then play 1 Inferno character with value 2 or less from your Storage Zone.

name: Segal
effect: [Defender / When Deployed] Return 1 character (other than this) from your Field to your hand. Then draw 2 cards. [Trash from hand: Block 1 attack damage]

name: Black Rabbit
effect: [When Deployed] Store 1 card from the top of your deck. Then recharge a character on your Field with a value of 3 or less.

name: Black Eagle
effect: [When Deployed] Trash 1 card from your Storage Zone. Then bottom deck 1 character with a value of 2 or less from the Field or Storage Zone.

name: Leopard
effect: [Defender / When Deployed] 1 of your characters on the Field (other than this) cannot be targeted until the start of your next turn. [Trash from hand: Block 1 attack damage]

name: Tiger
effect: [When Deployed] Store 1 Fire character from your hand. That character can attack the same turn it is played!

name: Reptile
effect: [Once Per Turn / During Your Turn] Bottom deck 1 card from your hand. Look at top 4; add 1 Inferno Character to hand. Place rest on bottom in any order.

name: Snake
effect: [SR / When Deployed] Return 1 Inferno character (value 3 or less, not Snake) from your Field or Storage to hand. Then play 1 Inferno character (value 3 or less) from your hand.

name: Sloth
effect: [SR / When Deployed] Choose 1 character with a value of 3 or less on the Field or in a Storage Zone and place it on the bottom of its owner's deck.

name: Cobra
effect: [Defender / Any Time] If this card is in your hand, you may trash it to block 1 attack damage at any time.

name: Boron
effect: [When Deployed] Discard 2 cards from a Player's hand if they have 7+. If discarded from top of deck, -1 health to a character.

name: Neon
effect: [When Deployed] Look at bottom 3 cards of deck. Choose 1 RAD character with value 3 or less to store; rearrange rest on top.

name: Silver
effect: [On Removal] If removed by battle, your Field Card gains 1 life. If discarded from top of deck, reduce a character's Health by 1.

name: Xenon
effect: [Only Once] Bottom deck up to 4 RAD cards from Trash (not Xenon). If discarded from top of deck, reduce a character's Health by 1.

name: Nitro
effect: [Defender / When Deployed] Discard top 2 cards of deck. Your other characters cannot be Removed from Field until your next turn.

name: Atom
effect: [When Deployed] Trash 2 cards from your hand, then draw 3 cards.

name: Sulfur
effect: [When Deployed] Take control of 1 opponent character with value 3 or less until your next turn, then trash it.

name: Zinc
effect: [On Block] Take control of the attacking character with value 1 or less.

name: Argon
effect: [When Deployed] Discard 1 card from your hand, then take control of 1 opponent character with value 2 or less.

name: Holmium
effect: [When Deployed] Discard the top card of your deck, then place up to 3 RAD characters from your Trash on the bottom of your deck.

name: Fermium
effect: [When Deployed] Look at the top 3 cards of your deck. Rearrange them and place any on top or bottom.

name: Copper
effect: [SR / When Deployed] Return 7 RAD characters from your Trash to the bottom of your deck, then discard the top 3 cards of your deck.

name: Tin
effect: [SR / When Deployed] Return 1 RAD character you control to your hand, then play 1 RAD character with cost 4 or less from your Trash.

name: Manganese
effect: [SR / When Deployed] Trash 1 Field character. Your Field Card gains 1 life and your opponent's Field Card loses 1 life.

name: Gold
effect: [SR / When Deployed] Reduce all opponent Field characters' value by 2. Play up to 2 RAD characters from your Trash.
